goal: Align the CUDA real-adapter operator handoff with the new v0 bundle gate. Since v0 readiness now requires GO_REAL_ADAPTER_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE, the handoff must run the real-adapter evidence bundle verifier after the live RC gate and before the final v0 readiness recheck. Current local artifacts must remain NOT_GO.
head: d39e029
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, UI, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or model behavior changes
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO from current local artifacts
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, M6, bundle, or v0 release evidence acceptance
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update the CUDA handoff generator/tests/current handoff evidence and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Handoff command sequence includes real_adapter_evidence_bundle_verification before v0 readiness recheck
Handoff operator rules mention bundle GO as a required v0 release precondition
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO due missing real trained adapter endpoint evidence.
This gate updates operator handoff sequencing only and does not generate a trained adapter.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped handoff alignment gate after confirming v0 readiness now requires GO_REAL_ADAPTER_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE but the CUDA handoff still jumped from rc_gate_live directly to v0_readiness_recheck.
phase_notes.audit: Read the current handoff generator, focused tests, generated handoff JSON/Markdown, and v0 readiness audit. The handoff command sequence still jumped from rc_gate_live directly to v0_readiness_recheck even though v0 readiness now requires GO_REAL_ADAPTER_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE.
phase_notes.build: Added an evidence_bundle_verification command row that runs scripts/verify_real_adapter_evidence_bundle.py --expected-decision GO before v0_readiness_recheck. Surfaced current real_adapter_evidence_bundle_* readiness fields in handoff JSON/Markdown and updated focused tests for the exact sequence.
phase_notes.check: Passed json.tool, py_compile, focused handoff pytest, regenerated current handoff evidence, v0 readiness expected NOT_GO, v0 JSON validation, hook-reported .venv m1-smoke bootstrap, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check.
phase_notes.done: CUDA handoff bundle step is complete. The operator handoff now requires GO_REAL_ADAPTER_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE before v0 readiness recheck, while current local artifacts remain WAITING_FOR_REAL_ADAPTER_INPUTS / NOT_GO.

pabcd.approved_scope: CUDA handoff generator/tests/evidence, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/UI/training/export behavior changes, no model artifacts, no release GO claim from current local artifacts.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.plan: Open scoped handoff alignment gate after confirming v0 readiness now requires GO_REAL_ADAPTER_EVIDENCE_BUNDLE but the CUDA handoff still jumped from rc_gate_live directly to v0_readiness_recheck.
